$comment: Downstream consumers of Cortexel. A consumer listed here is NOT thereby certified. 'state' is the only claim.

consumers.notes: Engram consumes published Cortexel commits as a pinned git dependency and may carry a generated manifest snapshot. No integration run against the 0.9.0 contract has been executed from this repository, so no compatibility claim is made.

The NCP observation adapter targets an immutable released NCP identity only. NCP's own HEAD was described upstream as an unreleased, release-blocked 1.0 candidate; Cortexel must not certify against moving HEAD. No NCP release has been certified.
